nasb.text: You will make known to me the path of life; In Your presence is fullness of joy; In Your right hand there are pleasures forever.

esv.text: You make known to me the path of life; in your presence there is fullness of joy; at your right hand are pleasures forevermore.

cnv.text: 你必把生命的路指示我， 在你面前有滿足的喜樂， 在你的右手中有永遠的福樂。

ccb.text: 你把生命之路指示我， 你右手有永远的福乐， 我在你面前充满喜乐。

csbs.text: 你使我明白生命的路途； 在你面前有满足的喜乐， 在你的右手中有永久的美福。
